title: Proclamation No. 86, s. 1936
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

BY THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES PROCLAMATION NO. 86

ESTABLISHING AS BULA FOREST RESERVE FOR FOREST PROTECTION AND TIMBER PRODUCTION A PARCEL OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BULA, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR, ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon the recommendation of the Director of Forestry, approved by the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce, and pursuant to the provisions of section eighteen hundred and twenty-six of Act Numbered Twenty-seven hundred and eleven, known as the Revised Administrative Code, I, Manuel L, Quezon, President of the Philippines, hereby establish for forest protection and timber production the Bula Forest; Reserve and place it under the administration and control of the Bureau of Forestry, which shall have the authority to regulate the use and occupancy of said reserve, and the cutting, collection, and removal of timber and other forest products therein in accordance with the Forest Law and Regulations.

I, therefore, withdraw from sale or settlement, and hereby declare and proclaim to be the Bula Forest Reserve, subject to private rights, if any there be, that portion of the public domain situated in the Municipality of Bula, Province of Camarines Sur, Island of Luzon, described in the Bureau of Forestry map No. F. E.—70, to wit;

Beginning at point marked 1 on Bureau of Forestry map No. F. R.-70, a Ficus Sp., 20 cm. diameter, marked F. Z. 1366/188, identical to corner 61, block I, Camarines Sur, project No. 13, Bula, which is N. 88° W., about 7,150 meters from the poblacion of Bula, Camarines Sur; thence N. 71° E., 360 meters to corner 2,.an anilao tree, 25 cm. diameter, marked F, Z. 1366/128, identical to corner 60, block I, Camarines Sur project No. 13, Bula; thence S. 80° E., 305 meters to corner 3, a white lauan tree, 50 cm. diameter, marked F. Containing an area about 2, 168 hectares.

Corners 1 to 8, 18 to 24, 34, and 63 to 74 are marked with Bureau of Forestry official marking hatchet No. 344; corners 9 to 17, 27 to 33, and 35 to 45 with B. F. 447; corner 25 with B.F. 148; corner 26 with B. F. 254; corner 47 to 52 with B. F. 425; and corners 53 to 62 with B. F. 340.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this fifteenth day of September, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and thirty-six, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the first.

MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: ELPIDIO QUIRINO Secretary of the Interior

Source: Presidential Museum and Library
